title: Hexaemeron: On the Six Days of Creation
description: Basil's nine homilies on Genesis 1: how to read creation scientifically and spiritually at once.
introduction: Basil's nine homilies on Genesis 1: how to read creation scientifically and spiritually at once.

translation.text: In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth. What mind can grasp the meaning of this saying?
